entry.title: 7 à toi - Émission 7

link.title: 7 à toi - Émission 7

entry.content:
• Calcul mental : Une astuce pour soustraire 9 ou 19 rapidement.
• Mathématiques : Comment doubler facilement ? Trouver et utiliser les doubles sans apprendre ses tables.
• Portrait : Découvrir la vie de Violette Maurice. Quand poésie et engagement se croisent…
• Valise des mots : Apprendre à écrire et à retenir l’orthographe des mots : fête, festivités, festivals, festoyer, feston et faites la fête !
• Français : Jouons avec les expansion du nom !
• Lecture : Les trois vies de Petite Perle, de Carl Norac et Anne-Catherine De Boel.
Carl Norac est un écrivain-voyageur. Il a écrit une histoire qui se passe à Taiwan. Là-bas, les habitants lancent une lanterne quand ils ont un vœu à réaliser. Deux enfants se rencontrent à cette occasion, ils se promènent, s’amusent, rient ensemble mais un jour la petite fille explique son secret à son nouvel ami…
• Quizz : Quizz histoire !
entry.summary: • Calcul mental : Une astuce pour soustraire 9 ou 19 rapidement. • Mathématiques : Comment doubler facilement ? Trouver et utiliser les doubles sans apprendre ses tables. • Portrait : Découvrir la vie de Violette Maurice. Quand poésie et engagement se croisent… • Valise des mots : Apprendre à écrire et à retenir l’orthographe des mots : fête, festivités, festivals, festoyer, feston et faites la fête ! • Français : Jouons avec les expansion du nom ! • Lecture : Les trois vies de Petite Perle, de Carl Norac et Anne-Catherine De Boel. Carl Norac est un écrivain-voyageur. Il a écrit une histoire qui se passe à Taiwan. Là-bas, les habitants lancent une lanterne quand ils ont un vœu à réaliser. Deux enfants se rencontrent à cette occasion, ils se promènent, s’amusent, rient ensemble mais un jour la petite fille explique son secret à son nouvel ami… • Quizz : Quizz histoire !

entry.title: Amitabh Bachchan : Celebs Emotional, Twitter Prays Pawan Kalyan Emotional Tweet Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Amitabh Bachchan : Celebs Emotional, Twitter Prays Pawan Kalyan Emotional Tweet Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Power Star Pawan Kalyan emotional tweet amid Amitabh Bachchan’ coronavirus tested positive. He wrote in twitter that, I still remember, so vividly, when my entire family including my mother and father prayed for your well being, when you got injured in Coolie shoot.
#GetwellsoonAmithabbachansir
#AmitabhBachchan
#PowerStarPawanKalyan
#COVID19
#AbhishekBachchan
#AishwaryaRaiBachchan
#BigB
#AishwaryaRai
#JayaBachchan
#nanavatihospital
#Mumbai
అమితాబ్ బచ్చన్ తనకు కరోనా సోకిందని నిన్న రాత్రి సోషల్ మీడియా వేదికగా ప్రకటించాడు. తనకు, అభిషేక్ బచ్చన్‌కు కరోనా పాజిటివ్ వచ్చిందని హాస్పిటల్ జాయిన్ అయ్యామని తెలిపాడు. అమితాబ్ ఆరోగ్యంపై చింతిస్తూ.. పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ ఎమోషనల్ అయ్యాడు.
entry.summary: Power Star Pawan Kalyan emotional tweet amid Amitabh Bachchan’ coronavirus tested positive. He wrote in twitter that, I still remember, so vividly, when my entire family including my mother and father prayed for your well being, when you got injured in Coolie shoot. #GetwellsoonAmithabbachansir #AmitabhBachchan #PowerStarPawanKalyan #COVID19 #AbhishekBachchan #AishwaryaRaiBachchan #BigB #AishwaryaRai #JayaBachchan #nanavatihospital #Mumbai అమితాబ్ బచ్చన్ తనకు కరోనా సోకిందని నిన్న రాత్రి సోషల్ మీడియా వేదికగా ప్రకటించాడు. తనకు, అభిషేక్ బచ్చన్‌కు కరోనా పాజిటివ్ వచ్చిందని హాస్పిటల్ జాయిన్ అయ్యామని తెలిపాడు. అమితాబ్ ఆరోగ్యంపై చింతిస్తూ.. పవన్ కళ్యాణ్ ఎమోషనల్ అయ్యాడు.

entry.title: Sachin Pilot cancels presser, says ‘not joining BJP’ Oneindia News

link.title: Sachin Pilot cancels presser, says ‘not joining BJP’ Oneindia News

entry.content: After being removed from all key posts in Rajasthan Congress Sachin Pilot said today that he is not joining the BJP and still remains a Congress man. He said I would like to make it clear that I have no plans to join the BJP. The BJP link is an attempt to malign me in the eyes of the Gandhis. He insisted on still being a member of the Congress party. Vishwendra Singh, a rebel Congress MLA in Sachin Pilot’s camp, echoed the statement: "As far as we are concerned, we are with the congress. Speculation intensified after Sachin Pilot first put off, then cancelled his press briefing today. Pilot has said that he felt humiliated after being asked to answer questions in an investigation started by the Chief Minister into alleged attempts to dislodge the Congress government.
entry.summary: After being removed from all key posts in Rajasthan Congress Sachin Pilot said today that he is not joining the BJP and still remains a Congress man. He said I would like to make it clear that I have no plans to join the BJP. The BJP link is an attempt to malign me in the eyes of the Gandhis. He insisted on still being a member of the Congress party. Vishwendra Singh, a rebel Congress MLA in Sachin Pilot’s camp, echoed the statement: "As far as we are concerned, we are with the congress. Speculation intensified after Sachin Pilot first put off, then cancelled his press briefing today. Pilot has said that he felt humiliated after being asked to answer questions in an investigation started by the Chief Minister into alleged attempts to dislodge the Congress government.

entry.title: Bursa’da yıllar sonra görüntülendi

link.title: Bursa’da yıllar sonra görüntülendi

entry.content:
Bursa’da yıllar sonra su samuru görüntülendi. Yaralı su samurunu kurtarmak için vatandaşlar harekete geçti.
Bursa’nın İznik ilçesinde yıllar sonra görülen su samuru sevindirirken, yaralı olması yürekleri burktu. Tabiatın normal dengesine yavaş yavaş geri dönmesi bölge sakinlerini sevindirirken, kırık bir dişi ve tutmayan arka ayaklarıyla su samuru görüntülendi. Çakırca Karasu deresinde oldukça azalan suyun içerisinde vatandaşlar tarafından görüntülenen su samurunu bu hale insnaların getirmiş olabileceği düşünülüyor. Vücudunda darp izleri de bulanan su samuru için vatandaşlar harekete geçti. Jandarma ile irtibata geçen vatandaşlar, kısa süre sonra su samurunun öldüğünü ifade etti.
entry.summary: Bursa’da yıllar sonra su samuru görüntülendi. Yaralı su samurunu kurtarmak için vatandaşlar harekete geçti. Bursa’nın İznik ilçesinde yıllar sonra görülen su samuru sevindirirken, yaralı olması yürekleri burktu. Tabiatın normal dengesine yavaş yavaş geri dönmesi bölge sakinlerini sevindirirken, kırık bir dişi ve tutmayan arka ayaklarıyla su samuru görüntülendi. Çakırca Karasu deresinde oldukça azalan suyun içerisinde vatandaşlar tarafından görüntülenen su samurunu bu hale insnaların getirmiş olabileceği düşünülüyor. Vücudunda darp izleri de bulanan su samuru için vatandaşlar harekete geçti. Jandarma ile irtibata geçen vatandaşlar, kısa süre sonra su samurunun öldüğünü ifade etti.

entry.title: Preserving Buddhist treasures in Afghanistan

link.title: Preserving Buddhist treasures in Afghanistan

entry.content: Historians at the University of Chicago and teachers in Afghanistan are working to save artefacts looted or destroyed during four decades of war or under strict Taliban rule.
entry.summary: Historians at the University of Chicago and teachers in Afghanistan are working to save artefacts looted or destroyed during four decades of war or under strict Taliban rule.

entry.title: Counterprosters helped shut down a white nationalist rally in Tennessee using humor [Mic Archives]

link.title: Counterprosters helped shut down a white nationalist rally in Tennessee using humor [Mic Archives]

entry.content: On Saturday, dozens of white nationalists descended on Shelbyville, Tennessee, for a “White Lives Matter” rally. The event was organized by the Nationalist Front, which is the largest coalition of white nationalist and neo-Nazi groups in the U.S. Rally attendees shouted “blood and soil” and “Jews will not replace us.” Rather than respond with vitriol and hate, counterprotesters used humor to drown out the rally attendees, blasting La Bamba and Beyoncé on loudspeakers. Rally organizers ended up canceling a planned rally in a nearby city.
entry.summary: On Saturday, dozens of white nationalists descended on Shelbyville, Tennessee, for a “White Lives Matter” rally. The event was organized by the Nationalist Front, which is the largest coalition of white nationalist and neo-Nazi groups in the U.S. Rally attendees shouted “blood and soil” and “Jews will not replace us.” Rather than respond with vitriol and hate, counterprotesters used humor to drown out the rally attendees, blasting La Bamba and Beyoncé on loudspeakers. Rally organizers ended up canceling a planned rally in a nearby city.

entry.title: Man City - Après la décision du TAS, Guardiola demande ‘des excuses’

link.title: Man City - Après la décision du TAS, Guardiola demande ‘des excuses’

entry.content: Le Tribunal arbitral du sport a annulé la suspension de Manchester City pour deux ans de toutes compétitions européennes. Le club avait dans un premier temps écopé de cette sanction de la part de l’UEFA pour non respect du Fair Play Financier. Une décision finalement annulée en appel par le TAS L’entraîneur Pep Guardiola a lui demandé des excuses à tous les détracteurs de Manchester City qui n’ont selon lui pas respecté le droit à la "la présomption d’innocence".
entry.summary: Le Tribunal arbitral du sport a annulé la suspension de Manchester City pour deux ans de toutes compétitions européennes. Le club avait dans un premier temps écopé de cette sanction de la part de l’UEFA pour non respect du Fair Play Financier. Une décision finalement annulée en appel par le TAS L’entraîneur Pep Guardiola a lui demandé des excuses à tous les détracteurs de Manchester City qui n’ont selon lui pas respecté le droit à la "la présomption d’innocence".

entry.title: Gubernur Anies: Museum Sejarah Nabi di Ancol Terbesar di Luar Saudi Arabia

link.title: Gubernur Anies: Museum Sejarah Nabi di Ancol Terbesar di Luar Saudi Arabia

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Gubernur DKI Jakarta Anies Baswedan mengatakan museum sejarah nabi yang akan dibangun di kawasan reklamasi Ancol bakal menjadi museum sejarah nabi terbesar di luar Saudi Arabia.
"Museum ini akan menjadi museum terbesar tentang sejarah nabi di luar Saudi Arabia," kata Anies dalam siaran YouTube Pemprov DKI Jakarta pada Sabtu, 11 Juli 2020.
Museum Sejarah Nabi itu nantinya akan mengambil 3 hektare dari 120 hektare lahan yang direncanakan.
"Di kawasan ini akan di ambil 3 hektare dari 120 hektare yang direncanakan, dari 20 yang sudah ada hanya 3 hektare untuk membangun Museum Sejarah Nabi," jelasnya.
Museum ini pun akan dibangun di tepi pantai dan menjadi bagian dari kawasan Ancol.
"Museum sejarah nabi ini akan menjadi museum yang dibangun di tepi pantai, bagian dari kawasan Ancol," ucap Anies.
Gubernur DKI Jakarta Anies Baswedan juga berencana untuk mengembangkan kawasan wisata ini bukan saja bagi Indonesia tapi juga Asia Tenggara bahkan di Asia.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Gubernur DKI Jakarta Anies Baswedan mengatakan museum sejarah nabi yang akan dibangun di kawasan reklamasi Ancol bakal menjadi museum sejarah nabi terbesar di luar Saudi Arabia. "Museum ini akan menjadi museum terbesar tentang sejarah nabi di luar Saudi Arabia," kata Anies dalam siaran YouTube Pemprov DKI Jakarta pada Sabtu, 11 Juli 2020. Museum Sejarah Nabi itu nantinya akan mengambil 3 hektare dari 120 hektare lahan yang direncanakan. "Di kawasan ini akan di ambil 3 hektare dari 120 hektare yang direncanakan, dari 20 yang sudah ada hanya 3 hektare untuk membangun Museum Sejarah Nabi," jelasnya. Museum ini pun akan dibangun di tepi pantai dan menjadi bagian dari kawasan Ancol. "Museum sejarah nabi ini akan menjadi museum yang dibangun di tepi pantai, bagian dari kawasan Ancol," ucap Anies. Gubernur DKI Jakarta Anies Baswedan juga berencana untuk mengembangkan kawasan wisata ini bukan saja bagi Indonesia tapi juga Asia Tenggara bahkan di Asia.

entry.title: Kuldeep Oraon: Martyred in Malbagh in J&K, laid down his life for the nation Oneindia News

link.title: Kuldeep Oraon: Martyred in Malbagh in J&K, laid down his life for the nation Oneindia News

entry.content: Kuldeep Oraon, posted in CRPF’s 118th Battalion, was killed in an encounter with terrorists in Malbagh on 2 July 2020. On receiving the news of Kuldeep’s martyrdom, his father Ghanshyam Oraon said that he is proud of him, but the government should take revenge. Ghanshyam Oraon was also posted in CRPF 190 Battalion and retired in 2007. Kuldeep Oraon joined the CRPF in January 2001 and got a promotion as well. Kuldeep has left behind his wife and two children. His son Yash is 10 years old while his daughter is 6 years old. Martyr’s wife Vandana Oraon is posted as constable in Kolkata Police and both children used to stay with them in Kolkata.
entry.summary: Kuldeep Oraon, posted in CRPF’s 118th Battalion, was killed in an encounter with terrorists in Malbagh on 2 July 2020. On receiving the news of Kuldeep’s martyrdom, his father Ghanshyam Oraon said that he is proud of him, but the government should take revenge. Ghanshyam Oraon was also posted in CRPF 190 Battalion and retired in 2007. Kuldeep Oraon joined the CRPF in January 2001 and got a promotion as well. Kuldeep has left behind his wife and two children. His son Yash is 10 years old while his daughter is 6 years old. Martyr’s wife Vandana Oraon is posted as constable in Kolkata Police and both children used to stay with them in Kolkata.

entry.title: PTV Home Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu Season 3 Episode 33 in hindi urdu subtitles

link.title: PTV Home Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu Season 3 Episode 33 in hindi urdu subtitles

entry.content:
PTV Home Dirilis Ertugrul season 3 episode 34 HD Urdu hindi subtitles
Share link:
Please Follow my videos to stay in touch with more videos.
ertugrul, ertugrul ghazi, ertugrul ghazi urdu, dirilis ertugrul, resurrection ertugrul, ertugrul season 3, etugrul season 2 urdu, turkish drama urdu dub, dirilis etugrul urdu, ertugrul ghazi in urdu, ptv, ptv home, ertugurl urdu, resurrection ertugrul season 3, urdu, trt, ertugrul trt, etugrul ptv, ertugurl dubbing, turkish drama Urdu, turkish drama, Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu Season 3,
The heroic story of Ertugrul Ghazi, the daddy of Osman (Uthman) who founded the Ottoman Empire. —Tamimi. Edit Report This. This series is about the Turkish warrior Ertugrul from the 13th century, one among the foremost famous warriors of his time and also the daddy of Osman (the founder of the Ottoman Empire). The show is predicated on the history of the Muslim Oghuz Turks and takes place within the 13th century. It centers around the lifetime of Ertuğrul, the daddy of Osman I, who was the founding father of the Ottoman Empire. it’s been well received, particularly within the Muslim world.
entry.summary: PTV Home Dirilis Ertugrul season 3 episode 34 HD Urdu hindi subtitles Share link: Please Follow my videos to stay in touch with more videos. ertugrul, ertugrul ghazi, ertugrul ghazi urdu, dirilis ertugrul, resurrection ertugrul, ertugrul season 3, etugrul season 2 urdu, turkish drama urdu dub, dirilis etugrul urdu, ertugrul ghazi in urdu, ptv, ptv home, ertugurl urdu, resurrection ertugrul season 3, urdu, trt, ertugrul trt, etugrul ptv, ertugurl dubbing, turkish drama Urdu, turkish drama, Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu Season 3, The heroic story of Ertugrul Ghazi, the daddy of Osman (Uthman) who founded the Ottoman Empire. —Tamimi. Edit Report This. This series is about the Turkish warrior Ertugrul from the 13th century, one among the foremost famous warriors of his time and also the daddy of Osman (the founder of the Ottoman Empire). The show is predicated on the history of the Muslim Oghuz Turks and takes place within the 13th century. It centers around the lifetime of Ertuğrul, the daddy of Osman I, who was the founding father of the Ottoman Empire. it’s been well received, particularly within the Muslim world.

entry.title: La famine engendrée par la pandémie pourrait tuer davantage que le virus lui-même

link.title: La famine engendrée par la pandémie pourrait tuer davantage que le virus lui-même

entry.content:
120 000 personnes pourraient mourir chaque jour à la fin de l’année des conséquences liées à la crise sanitaire.
Pertes d’emplois, basculement dans l’extrême pauvreté… Les conséquences pourraient être désastreuses.
L’ONU et l’OMC alertaient déjà sur les risques de crise alimentaire mondiale que pourrait provoquer la pandémie.
Aujourd’hui, un rapport d’Oxfam indique que 122 millions de personnes pourraient basculer profondément dans la famine.
Les pays pauvres seront bien sûr les plus touchés et 10 foyers de « famine extrême » ont été recensés.
Oxfam appelle les pays à annuler la dette des pays en développement par libérer des fonds pour la protection sociale.
entry.summary: 120 000 personnes pourraient mourir chaque jour à la fin de l’année des conséquences liées à la crise sanitaire. Pertes d’emplois, basculement dans l’extrême pauvreté… Les conséquences pourraient être désastreuses. L’ONU et l’OMC alertaient déjà sur les risques de crise alimentaire mondiale que pourrait provoquer la pandémie. Aujourd’hui, un rapport d’Oxfam indique que 122 millions de personnes pourraient basculer profondément dans la famine. Les pays pauvres seront bien sûr les plus touchés et 10 foyers de « famine extrême » ont été recensés. Oxfam appelle les pays à annuler la dette des pays en développement par libérer des fonds pour la protection sociale.

#Ladiesnotallowed
#TeluguCinema
లేడీస్ నత్ అలవెడ్ సినిమా ట్రైలర్ విడుదల అయింది. తెలుగు చిత్ర పరశ్రమలో ఇలాంటి ట్రైలర్ మీరు ఎప్పుడు చూసి ఉండరు. కె ఆర్ ప్రొడక్షన్స్ సమర్పణ లో రమేష్ కావాలి నిర్మిస్తున్న ఈ చిత్రానికి సాయి రామ్ దాసరి దర్శకుడు.
entry.summary: Ladies not allowed movie official trailer. Watch it on your own risk. produced by ramesh kavali and directed by sai ram Dasari. #Tollywood #Movienews #Ladiesnotallowed #TeluguCinema లేడీస్ నత్ అలవెడ్ సినిమా ట్రైలర్ విడుదల అయింది. తెలుగు చిత్ర పరశ్రమలో ఇలాంటి ట్రైలర్ మీరు ఎప్పుడు చూసి ఉండరు. కె ఆర్ ప్రొడక్షన్స్ సమర్పణ లో రమేష్ కావాలి నిర్మిస్తున్న ఈ చిత్రానికి సాయి రామ్ దాసరి దర్శకుడు.

entry.title: Agrima Joshua gets vile threats from Shubham Mishra ‘triggered’ over Shivaji jokes Oneindia News

link.title: Agrima Joshua gets vile threats from Shubham Mishra ‘triggered’ over Shivaji jokes Oneindia News

entry.content:
The internet is supposed to be a democratic place, but often for women social media becomes an extension of the unsafe outdoors that they are generally accustomed to. In a shocking and sickeningly common occurrence, a woman standup comedian based in Mumbai, Agrima Joshua, was at the receiving end of threats for making a few jokes on followers of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. The man responsible, Shubham Mishra, is now in custody. This is what happened.
#AgrimaJoshua #ShubhamMishra #ShivajiMaharaj
entry.summary: The internet is supposed to be a democratic place, but often for women social media becomes an extension of the unsafe outdoors that they are generally accustomed to. In a shocking and sickeningly common occurrence, a woman standup comedian based in Mumbai, Agrima Joshua, was at the receiving end of threats for making a few jokes on followers of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. The man responsible, Shubham Mishra, is now in custody. This is what happened. #AgrimaJoshua #ShubhamMishra #ShivajiMaharaj
